name: Welcome to Hogwarts
description:
Welcome to Hogwarts, set in the magical world of Harry Potter by J.K. Rowling. Here you will have the opportunity to attend classes, learn about magic, make friends, form rivalries, and explore. Or be the new Defense Against the Dark Arts professor and teach witchcraft and wizardry to your favorite characters.

In order to make certain that you get into the House of your choice: Try using the Response Prefill feature under generation settings and instruct the bot to sort you however you want. Don't forget to delete the prefill after you've been sorted to prevent it from messing up future responses.

This bot has 3 openings:

1. Begin your story at the sorting ceremony where you'll discover your House, make new friends and maybe some new enemies.

  1. Hermione and Luna are having an argument, and they turn to the new Defense Against the Dark Arts professor, you, to settle it.

  2. Aboard the Hogwarts Express, you and the other students are headed to another year of school. Harry Potter and Ron Weasley stand off against Crabbe and Goyle. Will you pick a side?

  3. Choose your own adventure by explaining to the bot how you'd like to begin.

    UPDATE: In addition to the new openings, I've moved Gilderoy Lockhart from the character definitions to the Lorebook and added the other DADA professors. (I had Lockhart simply because he was my favorite before.) This means you can now pick which professor you want simply by mentioning them in your story. Fewer tokens, more options! I also made a small addition to Luna: now instead of focusing exclusively on Nargles and other creatures, she should also be a bit of a conspiracy nut, just like in the books.

I hope you enjoy.

*

Please do not advertise in the comment section. Feedback is greatly appreciated.

Characters you may meet include but are not limited too: Albus Dumbledore, Severus Snape, Minerva McGonagall, Pomona Sprout, Hagrid, Gilderoy Lockhart, Draco Malfoy, Pansy Parkinson, Hermione Granger, Hannah Abbot, Luna Lovegood, Madam Pince, Harry Potter, Ron Weasley, Vincent Crabbe, Gregory Goyle, Blaise Zabini, Millicent Bulstrode, Daphne Greengrass,Tracy Davis, Cedric Diggory, Theodore Nott, Neville Longbottom, Remus Lupin, Dolores Umbridge, Horace Slughorn, Oliver Wood, Alicia Spinnet, Susan Bones, Padma Patil, Parvati Patil, Ginny Weasley, The Weasley Twins, Fred Weasley, George Weasley, Roger Davies, Lavender Brown, Cho Chang, Katie Bell, Angelina Johnson, and more!

*

Check out the Hogwarts Legacy version of this bot here: Welcome to Hogwarts Legacy

kw: rpg, roleplay, roleplaying, rp, lorebook, lore book, lore-book

All characters are 18+
